CustomField.description: This is populated from Automation, scheduled flow: Association_Scheduled_CalcActiveAssignments. Counts how many active assignments (person assignments) there are for a Lokalförening/Lokallokal förening. The value is later on user to determine the status of a Lokal-/Lokallokalförening. 0 active assignments = status 'Vilande'
CustomField.label: Antal Aktiva Uppdrag
